name: above
title: above
summary: Network security sniffer for finding vulnerabilities in the network
description:
Network security sniffer for finding vulnerabilities in the network
This package contains a network security sniffer for finding vulnerabilities
in the network, designed for pentesters and security professionals.
.
It is based entirely on network traffic analysis, so it does not make any
noise on the air. Above allows pentesters to automate the process of finding
vulnerabilities in network hardware. Discovery protocols, dynamic routing,
FHRP, STP, LLMNR/NBT-NS, etc.
.
The tool can also both listen to traffic on the interface and analyze already
existing pcap files.
